query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: select buildings in the municipality (by kommunenummer)

3.description: select 200-year storm-surge polygons intersecting the municipality envelope

4.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year storm-surge polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per building (count intersections per building)

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS envelope_wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, bygningsnummer, ST_X(representasjonspunkt) AS x, ST_Y(representasjonspunkt) AS y, ST_SRID(representasjonspunkt) AS srid
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS envelope_wkt
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
